results.title: Quant Analytics Sr Associate - Model Risk | Jobflarely
highlights:
Quant Analytics Sr Associate - Model Risk | Jobflarely
...
# Quant Analytics Sr Associate - Model Risk
...
Location: 127 Public Square, Cleveland Ohio ABOUT THE JOB As a Senior Quantitative Analytics Associate, you will be at the forefront of validating models for Market Risk, IRRBB (including NII, EVE, Deposit modeling), and Liquidity. Your expertise in machine learning will be instrumental in developing advanced use cases such as generative AI for scenario simulation, reinforcement learning for deep hedging, and machine learning techniques for model calibration. You will also incorporate the latest market risk trends – including heightened uncertainty around interest rate movements and increased market volatility – ensuring our models remain aligned with current industry standards and best practices. This role offers a fantastic opportunity to learn and grow, gaining exposure to a wide range of market risk pricing models, term structure models, hedging models, and risk models. ESSENTIAL JOB FUNCTIONS Validate models for Market Risk, IRRBB, Liquidity, and other risk areas Apply machine learning techniques to enhance and support model validation processes Deliver insightful analysis to address complex business problems Communicate findings effectively to partners, translating complex theories into easy-to-understand language REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS Master’s degree in a quantitative discipline with 2+ years of relevant experience Familiarity with Market Risk, IRRBB, and Liquidity concepts Familiarity with regulatory requirements such as SR11-07, IRRBB regulations, Market Risk Rule, FRTB, and SIMM Exposure to market risk pricing models, term structure models, hedging models, asset liability models, deposit pricing and runoff models, or other risk models spanning interest rate derivatives, commodities, FX, CDS, fixed income, and equity SYSTEMS & TOOLS Experience with leading quantitative risk systems such as Calypso, RiskWatch, Bloomberg, QRM, and BlackRock, as well as cloud infrastructure platforms like GCP. COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS This position is eligible to earn a base salary in the range of $94,000.00 - $175,000.00 annually. Placement within the pay range may differ based upon various factors, including but not limited to skills, experience and geographic location. Compensation for this role also includes eligibility for incentive compensation which may include production, commission, and/or discretionary incentives. Please click here for a list of benefits for which this position is eligible. Key has implemented an approach to employee workspaces which prioritizes in-office presence, while providing flexible options in circumstances where roles can be performed effectively in a mobile environment. Job Posting Expiration Date: 02/22/2026 KeyCorp is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to sustaining an inclusive culture. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, genetic information, pregnancy, disability, veteran status or any other characteristic protected by law. Qualified individuals with disabilities or disabled veterans who are unable or limited in their ability to apply on this site may request reasonable accommodations by emailing . #LI-Remote

results.title: KeyCorp AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
KeyCorp, a Cleveland-based regional bank with $187-189 billion in assets, is strategically positioning itself for AI transformation across multiple business lines[1]. The company has identified approximately 40 AI proofs of concept spanning AML, content creation, and underwriting[2]. KeyBank has taken a cautious but systematic approach to AI adoption, establishing an Enterprise Center of Excellence for AI and Chat Capabilities[3]. The bank has deployed AI primarily in customer service operations and is expanding into financial wellness through partnerships with vendors like Personetics[4]. KeyBank hired an AI Risk Advisor to ensure responsible AI implementation across the organization, focusing particularly on Generative AI adoption[1].

# [Hiring] Senior Auditor – Data Analytics (Consultant) @0100 KeyBank National Association
...
Senior Auditor - Data Analytics (Consultant) will be responsible for the following: Leverage current and emerging enterprise technologies to progress RRG’s data analytics strategy to advanced stages of RRG’s maturity model. Leverage existing enterprise meta data repositories and assist in the development of RRG documentation on data sources to facilitate locating, accessing, understanding and analyzing data. Evaluate centralized and decentralized data sources and provide feedback to the Data Analytics Manager with supporting recommendations and implementation strategies.
...
Partner with Key Technology & Operations personnel to identify efficient means of harvesting data for analysis as well as emerging tools and technologies. Thoroughly understand the objectives of audit teams to creatively identify/define analytics that can improve the efficiency and effectiveness of audits. Act as an internal consultant to various RRG teams, providing expert knowledge of company systems, processes and associated data. Assist audit teams throughout the data acquisition process to ensure that the requirements for scoped analytics are met within reasonable timeframes.
...
Design and evolve methods to integrate the use of data analytics into risk reviews, risk universe scoring, risk indicators, annual planning, continuous monitoring, and continuous auditing. Assist in the development of the standard toolkit for data mining and data analytics that generally utilizes bolthires Cloud Platform BigQuery or Python. Analyze and develop visualization and reporting solutions utilizing Tableau or Power BI. Promote the use of a data quality framework to 1) demonstrate the accuracy of data used by RRG for data analytics and 2) provide the criteria for RRG to evaluate the accuracy of data used for regulatory and management reporting.
...
Assist management in enforcing new standards and methodologies that enhance the data analytics strategy and framework. Stay abreast of evolving utilization, best practices, and trends in the use of data analytics for internal audit, credit, operational and other risk areas within large banks. Stay informed on regulatory expectations for the use of data analytics in banks. Keep RRG management apprised of trends and evaluation of RRG adoption in relation to trends and expectations. bolthires Cloud Platform BigQuery, SQL, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide, Excel/VBA, etc.) Experience with visualization and business intelligence tools (i.e. Tableau, Power BI, etc.) Excellent interpersonal, facilitation, and negotiation skills
...

highlights:
I’m a Lead Data Engineer with over a decade of experience building and modernizing enterprise data platforms across banking, healthcare, and insurance. My work spans the full data lifecycle, from traditional ETL and data warehousing to scalable cloud-based architectures, real-time processing, lakehouse environments, and AI-enabled data ecosystems. I specialize in designing robust, high-performance data pipelines, building scalable ETL/ELT frameworks, and creating reliable data foundations that support analytics, reporting, machine learning, and operational decision-making. My experience includes working with large-scale structured and semi-structured data, cloud data platforms, orchestration, metadata-driven engineering, data quality, and performance optimization. More recently, I’ve focused on enabling AI-driven capabilities within enterprise data environments by helping build retrieval-based systems, intelligent knowledge solutions, and modern data platforms that make information more accessible and actionable. I enjoy solving complex data challenges, improving reliability and governance, and building systems that are both technically resilient and closely aligned with business goals. Across my career, I’ve worked in highly regulated industries where accuracy, security, compliance, and auditability are critical. I’m passionate about building future-ready cloud and data ecosystems, mentoring teams, and bridging the gap between engineering execution and business impact.
...
I architected and built scalable cloud-based data ingestion and ETL/ELT pipelines using Databricks for diverse enterprise data sources to support analytics, benchmarking, and reporting. My work included developing secure RAG-based solutions using foundation models, integrating Generative AI capabilities into data platforms for intelligent search, and improving LLM application performance by optimizing retrieval strategies and response relevance. I engineered real-time ingestion frameworks to stream raw event data with lower latency, led the migration of fragmented legacy data silos into centralized cloud platforms, and designed Medallion Architecture layers within the Databricks Lakehouse to transform raw data into clean, analytics-ready datasets using Delta Lake. In addition, I built transformation pipelines leveraging PySpark and Databricks Workflows, implemented robust transactional processing capabilities, developed APIs for downstream AI applications, and architected high-performance cloud-native frameworks that improved BI reporting, data freshness, and the processing of both structured and unstructured data.
...
and transform healthcare
...
analytical structures. My work included building and maintaining data pipelines that moved data from transactional systems, APIs, flat files, and event streams into Databricks Lakehouse environments
...
I optimized ingestion, storage, and transformation workflows using Delta Lake best practices such as Z-Ordering, Auto Loader, and the Photon engine to improve performance, scalability, and downstream reporting efficiency
...
I also engineered batch and near real-time pipelines for historical and streaming data using Databricks Structured Streaming, built data preparation workflows using MLflow to support machine learning, and contributed to early Generative AI and RAG-based solutions for semantic search, document retrieval, and summarization over unstructured healthcare data. In addition, I developed pipelines to sanitize, transform, tokenize, and prepare historical records for intelligent retrieval applications. I modernized legacy on-premises workloads into scalable cloud-based environments, implemented robust monitoring processes, and strengthened governance using Unity Catalog for centralized RBAC, encryption, lineage, metadata management, and audit-ready practices. Throughout this, I partnered with clinical stakeholders to refine requirements, validate outputs, and enable self-service BI adoption.

results.title: Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director | Wfh
highlights:
Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director | Wfh
...
# Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director
...
About this role: Wells Fargo is seeking an Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director, as part of the Artificial Intelligence team. Learn more about career areas and lines of business at wellsfargojobs.com. The Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director leads the enterprise-wide AI vision and strategy by managing a comprehensive AI roadmap aligned to business priorities, shaping governance and responsible AI practices, and driving market‑informed innovation. This role oversees the development and scaling of advanced AI capabilities, including machine learning, NLP, RPA, predictive analytics, and generative AI, while ensuring strict standards for security, fairness, ethics, and risk management. You will build strong cross‑functional partnerships across technology, business, operations, and risk to influence senior leaders, secure alignment, and representing the AI organization in key executive and regulatory forums. You will lead a high‑performing team of AI professionals, foster a culture of innovation and continuous learning, manage people and budget resources, and ensure successful delivery of large‑scale AI initiatives that meet regulatory, operational, and strategic business objectives. In this role, you will: Manage and develop the overall Artificial Intelligence roadmap for the company Provide leadership, management and direction companywide on artificial intelligence initiatives Develop market strategies for the company Lead Artificial Intelligence team by making strategic decisions to resolve robotics process automation, natural language processing, and machine learning Understand the options in the market and educating companywide on these opportunities Collaborate and influence all levels of professionals, including more experienced managers Lead team to achieve objectives Manage allocation of people and financial resources for Artificial Intelligence Solutions Develop and guide a culture of talent development to meet business objectives and strategy
...
- Lead Artificial Intelligence team by making strategic decisions to resolve robotics process automation, natural language processing, and machine learning
...
- 8+ years of Artificial Intelligence solutions experience, or equivalent experience demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education
...
- 5+ years of experience leading AI product strategy, including defining roadmaps, developing value propositions, and driving GTM execution for AI or AGI-enabled products
...
- 5+ years of experience designing or delivering enterprise-scale AI or AGI solutions, including model development, deployment architecture, data strategy, and governance frameworks
...
- 5+ years of experience leading transformation initiatives involving AI modernization, workflow automation, or enterprise-wide adoption of AI capabilities
...
- 5+ years of experience in deep understanding of AGI research, emerging AI paradigms, LLM architectures, foundation models, and model evaluation techniques, with ability to translate complex technical concepts into business impact
...
- Proven track record operating within regulated industries, preferably financial services, with deep understanding of compliance, risk, and supervisory expectations for AI
...
- Expert-level command of machine learning technologies, end‑to‑end model lifecycle management, generative AI, and modern enterprise AI platforms
...
- Strategic experience architecting and governing cloud‑based AI ecosystems (Azure, AWS, or GCP) at enterprise scale
...
- Deep knowledge of AI governance, model risk management, responsible AI principles, and the evolving regulatory landscape for advanced analytics
...
- Strong capability to influence, align, and collaborate with senior executives and cross‑functional leaders to drive enterprise‑wide adoption of AI

# Keywords Studios is hiring a AI Engineer (Fresher / Entry-Level)
...
Helpshift is a leading customer service platform powered by AI and automation, helping businesses deliver exceptional customer support experiences across digital channels. We are looking for passionate AI Engineers who are eager to build intelligent systems using the latest advancements in Generative AI, NLP, and Machine Learning.
...
As an Entry-Level AI Engineer, you will work with experienced engineers and data scientists to design, develop, and deploy AI-powered solutions. You will contribute to building conversational AI systems, intelligent automation workflows, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and machine learning applications that enhance customer support experiences.
...
This role is ideal for candidates with a strong foundation in Python, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Generative AI, and MLOps who are excited about solving real-world problems using AI technologies.

- Collaborate with senior engineers to deploy and monitor AI applications in production.

- Assist in model training, fine-tuning, evaluation, and experimentation.

...

...

- Hands-on academic projects, internships, or personal projects in AI/ML.
- Experience building chatbots, AI assistants, or NLP applications.

...
- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Passion for AI, Machine Learning, and emerging technologies.
